articles.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
articles.summary: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the outset of the US-Israel war with Iran.

articles.title: US marks 250th birthday with fireworks, flyovers and extreme weather
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump's speech included some of his political agenda but also honoured war veterans and American history.

articles.title: Evacuations in Guam as super typhoon Bavi approaches
articles.summary: The storm is forecast to bring winds in excess of 160mph and waves nearly 11m high when it makes landfall on Monday.

articles.title: Australia probes mystery space balls that washed up on beach
articles.summary: Officials are searching for the origins of six pieces of space debris discovered on Forrest Beach in Queensland.

articles.title: Chinese underground church figure Jin Mingri freed from prison
articles.summary: The Zion Church founder's release comes after a direct plea to Xi Jinping from Donald Trump.

articles.title: Moment of destiny for France's Le Pen in verdict to decide her future in presidential race
articles.summary: Far-right leader Marine Le Pen is appealing against a verdict which found her guilty of misusing EU funds.

articles.title: Nigeria says two nationals killed in South Africa amid rise of anti-migrant attacks
articles.summary: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".

articles.title: Thousands welcome home Cape Verde footballers after stunning World Cup run
articles.summary: Tens of thousands of fans formed an ocean of blue outside the airport in capital city, Praia.

articles.title: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
articles.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".

articles.title: Former chess champion Kramnik banned over cheating remarks
articles.summary: The former Russian world chess champion had accused other players, including the late Daniel Naroditsky, of cheating.
